emails.subject: RE: San Juan Pig
emails.body: RE: San Juan Pig Certainly Tiny

emails.subject: RE: San Juan Pig
emails.body: Ben, I understand the team collected pressure data at the mainline valves on the SJ lateral and forwarded to you all Tuesday. Have you had the opportunity to calculate the current eff. following the dry pig run made last week? Forwarded by David Roensch/ET&S/Enron on 02/08/2002 06:30 AM

emails.subject: RE: San Juan Pig
emails.body: David, Here is our efficiency analysis from the online model. This is just for the Bisti to Gallup section. The other sections have comparable results. You can see that before the pigging the average efficiency were at 1.005 and after the pigging it rose to 1.04. Thus, a 4% increase in efficiency. However I see a gradual decreasing trend towards 1.035 just less than a week after the pigging. Please let me know if you have any questions. ben

emails.subject: RE: San Juan Pig
emails.body: I would like to schedule a conf. call to discuss this next week (Tuesday?) if you all would be available. Let me know and I will make the arrangements. Thanks Forwarded by David Roensch/ET&S/Enron on 02/08/2002 06:48 PM

emails.subject: RE: San Juan Pig
emails.body: A conf. call has been set up for Tuesday February 12th at 9:00 A.M. Central time. 877-795-3687 pin 346994 10 ports will be available Forwarded by David Roensch/ET&S/Enron on 02/11/2002 04:49 PM
